approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-010 — Build Regie review interface
goal: Provide a local interface for context, sources, instructions, semantic/visual diff, partial approval, apply, verification and restore without terminal knowledge.

acceptance.assertion: Regie renders a source-bound proposal bundle and highlights uncertainty and stale inputs.
Operators can approve, reject or defer typed operations independently.
Apply and verification results are visible and receipt-bound.
Restore is available from the same reviewed operation context.
